judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed a reasonable plan (identify alive BRCA patients and compute CDH1 mutation rates) but selected the wrong cohort by filtering clinical cases to icd_o_3_site='C50.9' only (call_JBALkq2QO6VjHehbqUvqJoHW) instead of all breast sites, causing a severely incomplete BRCA alive set and incorrect percentages when intersected with CDH1-mutated barcodes (var_call_o2jSUaCoU2p4hUOh8Kqq2OjS).

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step (call_0XvGck9OSN5N8HUPhKK9DOpj), the agent added an unrequested filter to include only histological types with at least 5 alive patients (agg_f = agg[agg['alive_n']>=5]), which altered the ranking and omitted categories like "Mixed Histology (please specify)," leading to a top three that differs from the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved CDH1-mutated barcodes (call_Rj74yJxrRN7Ng6AlK69cfZTv) but then filtered “alive” BRCA cases using tumor_tissue_site='Breast' and days_to_death IS NULL only (call_iuNgUoKlebh5T4hzQ5HI5No9), yielding just one record and leading execute_python (call_5EeqWHRciLiXTWrmdyRAlTFf) to compute a trivial result before the agent incorrectly concluded it was unable to compute, instead of handling empty-string/null alive encodings or alternative vital status logic.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (call_0RnSSwstALu4FyhHWNaiLNj3), the agent incorrectly parsed "Alive" status from the free-text Patient_description using a regex that only matched "vital status is/=" Alive (missing other forms like "Vital status recorded as Alive" shown in var_call_8uoYUCzB2VGBXxnDCWZ7QmA3), undercounting alive BRCA patients and yielding wrong mutation percentages and rankings.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered alive BRCA patients by brittle text matching in Patient_description (query using ILIKE 'In the Breast invasive carcinoma dataset%') and extracted barcodes via a regex in execute_python, which likely missed many valid BRCA-alive records and undercounted cohorts, leading to incorrect mutation percentages and top histologies.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
